changes.reason: Strategy-profile discovery experiment. Append the dormant pullback_long_1dte companion after breakout_long_1dte so the proven 1DTE breakout fallback keeps first priority, while pullback_long_1dte can only participate where the existing 1DTE breakout profile does not claim the setup.

Activate the dormant 1DTE pullback companion in the one-DTE router. This avoids repeating failed breakout_long_1dte tightening and tests whether 1DTE fallback has a separate reclaim/pullback regime rather than one monolithic breakout regime.

expected_effect: Should preserve the profitable breakout_long_1dte fallback while discovering whether a 1DTE pullback companion can add or reroute valid 1DTE-only trades with better MAE/exposure quality. Reject if it cannibalizes breakout_long_1dte, cuts total net profit below 98% of run_001, lowers pnl_per_exposure_hour, or worsens 1DTE average/worst MAE.
label: 1dte-pullback-companion-activation
rationale: Use a strategy-profile discovery family because take-profit/local tuning is hard-saturated and prior 1DTE tightening, no-0DTE fallback pruning, and call-wall loosening all hurt objective. breakout_long_1dte is too profitable to tighten again: 20 trades, $1227.30 PnL, 157.84 PnL/exposure hour, but average MAE is still -123.94. Appending pullback_long_1dte is a config-only split test that keeps the existing 1DTE edge intact while testing a dormant companion profile.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: VALID_1DTE_ONLY contributed 20 trades and $1227.30 with no slow >=12h trades, but average MAE was -123.94 and prior breakout_long_1dte tightening reduced score and net profit. A companion route is a different mechanism from stricter breakout gates.
strategy_hypotheses.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion
strategy_hypotheses.risk: The added router profile may be unreachable, or it may cannibalize profitable breakout_long_1dte trades if router ordering or profile matching is broader than expected.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: 0DTE unavailable, 1DTE map valid, and ES state looks more like pullback/reclaim than breakout continuation.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL remains at least current $1227.30, total net profit remains at least 98% of run_001, 1DTE average MAE improves versus -123.94, and breakout_long_1dte PnL is not materially cannibalized.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: pullback_long produced $2413.20 but owns worst MAE -638.75; broad structure pruning would retain only 71.6% PnL and leave worst MAE unchanged, so profile splitting is preferable to global or parent-profile tightening.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Pullback Deep-Heat Split
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Current config keys may not express the deep-heat state without blocking protected profitable weak-structure pullbacks.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE pullback entries with weak structure distances, low VWAP acceleration, near-zero early MFE diagnostics, and delayed TP behavior.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Retain at least 90% of pullback_long PnL while improving pullback worst MAE from -638.75 toward <= -527 and improving combined PnL/exposure hour.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: The run remains a favorable long-only momentum/pullback regime with 97 completed trades, 100% realized win rate, no slow >=12h trades, and 0.5% drawdown, but it is weaker than t...

new_strategy_ideas.name: Pullback Deep-Heat Split
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: New split must reduce parent pullback_long worst MAE from -638.75 toward <= -527 while retaining >=90% of pullback PnL and improving combined PnL/exposure hour.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Extended VWAP Rejection State Split
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Worst MAE improves with retained total PnL >=97%, fast_under_15m trades down <=3, and extended_vwap_winners retained as much as possible.

new_strategy_ideas.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL remains >= current $1227, average MAE improves versus -123.94, and total score does not regress versus leader base.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Dormant Pin-Avoid Tail Companion
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Activated dormant profile must be independently positive, reduce combined pin/charm worst MAE, and preserve >=95% of charm_pin_pullback_long PnL.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Early Path Heat Classifier
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Reduce average hold and worst MAE while retaining no-stop-loss behavior and keeping realized PnL within 95% of baseline.
